121: pub fn update_pr_base_in_repo(pr_number: u64, new_base: &str, repo: Option<&str>) -> Result<()> {
122:     let num = pr_number.to_string();
123:     let mut args: Vec<&str> = vec!["pr", "edit", &num, "--base", new_base];
124:     let repo_arg: String;
125:     if let Some(r) = repo {
126:         repo_arg = r.to_string();
127:         args.push("--repo");
128:         args.push(&repo_arg);
129:     }
130:     run_gh(&args)?;
131:     Ok(())
132: }

138: pub fn get_pr_status_in_repo(branch: &str, repo: Option<&str>) -> Result<Option<PrInfo>> {
139:     // For cross-fork PRs, gh pr view needs the fork-prefixed head (e.g. "dezren39:feat/config").
140:     // Try the bare branch name first; if that fails and we have a repo, retry with cross-fork prefix.
141:     let result = get_pr_status_in_repo_with_head(branch, repo);
142:     if let Ok(Some(_)) = &result {
143:         return result;
144:     }
145:     // If bare name failed and we have a target repo, try with cross-fork head prefix.
146:     if repo.is_some() {
147:         // Load state to get the push remote for cross-fork head computation.
148:         if let Ok(state) = crate::stack::StackState::load() {
149:             let push_remote = state.effective_push_remote(branch);
150:             let cross_fork = cross_fork_head(branch, &push_remote, repo);
151:             if cross_fork != branch {
152:                 return get_pr_status_in_repo_with_head(&cross_fork, repo);
153:             }
154:         }
155:     }
156:     result
157: }
